intent: Planning-only universal PMD admin page specs. Do not implement UI from this file without separate task.
global_rules: Do not modify production UI in this spec task.
Do not invent database fields; fields are taken from controller/model config static review.
KPIs not already exposed by list model/filter should use fallback until backend support is explicitly added.

blocking_errors.finding: php artisan route:list cannot run in this workspace because setup/foundation files are missing; runtime route 500/asset verification must be performed on VPS with Playwright.
Static references exist to PMD mediafix vendor assets and pmd-waiter JS that should be checked by Playwright network-failure capture on production.
